data.description: Choose from the following options. You can't change your choice of fighting style until you reach 6th, 12th, or 18th level.
You can spend a first-level spell slot to regain hit points.

Starting at 2nd level, you can push yourself beyond your normal limits for one turn. On your turn, you can take one additional bonus action. Normally, this feature allows only a regular and one bonus action. Once you use this feature, you must finish a short or long rest before you can do so again. At 17th level, you can use it twice before needing to rest.

At level 3, you choose an archetype to emulate your combat style and techniques. You can choose from the Champion, Master, Eldritch Knight, or Battle Smith archetypes. At levels 7th, 10th, 15th, and 18th, you gain additional features from your chosen archetype.
